narrative:
Mary Ann Township (precinct in Licking County) has 1,420 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.7 percentage points.
